archetypes.title: The Bruiser
archetypes.description: Raw damage dealer. No tricks, just fists.
archetypes.abilityDesc: Deals +2 damage when attacking a target with lower ATK than this card

archetypes.title: The Snitch
archetypes.description: Reveals what the opponent is hiding.
archetypes.abilityDesc: On play: opponent must reveal 1 random card from their hand for the rest of the round

archetypes.title: The Lookout
archetypes.description: Eyes on every corner. Always watching.
archetypes.abilityDesc: On play: peek at the top 2 cards of your own deck, reorder them

archetypes.title: The Enforcer
archetypes.abilityDesc: +3 damage against cards from a rival affiliation

archetypes.title: The Hustler
archetypes.abilityDesc: On play: swap 1 card from your hand with 1 from your reserves

archetypes.title: The Medic
archetypes.description: Keeps people alive. For a price.
archetypes.abilityDesc: When sacrificed to heal: heals double the normal amount

archetypes.title: The Arsonist
archetypes.abilityDesc: On attack: also deals 1 damage to the card behind the vanguard (next in line)

archetypes.title: The Ghost
archetypes.abilityDesc: After attacking: cannot be targeted for the opponent's next turn

archetypes.title: The Fixer
archetypes.description: Makes problems disappear. Makes friends appear.
archetypes.abilityDesc: On play: change one card in your active stack's affiliation to match this card's for the round

archetypes.title: The Wheelman
archetypes.description: Gets people in. Gets people out.
archetypes.abilityDesc: On play: swap your vanguard with any card in your active hand (vanguard goes to hand at current HP)

archetypes.title: The Shark
archetypes.abilityDesc: +1 damage for every point of damage already on the enemy vanguard

archetypes.title: The Fence
archetypes.abilityDesc: On sacrifice: draw 2 cards instead of healing
